channel.title: GitHub Liquid Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Liquid in GitHub

item.title: Shopify/skeleton-theme
item.description: A minimal, carefully structured Shopify theme designed to help you quickly get started. Designed with modularity, maintainability, and Shopify's best practices in mind.

item.title: Shopify/dawn
item.description: Shopify's first source available reference theme, with Online Store 2.0 features and performance built-in.

item.title: TrellisCommerce/shopify-tailwind-starter-base
item.description: Shopify Dawn theme with Tailwind CSS & Prettier integrations
